address.description: Property. Address associated with the market or fair.

addressCountry.description: Property. Country in which the market or fair is located.

addressLocality.description: Property. Locality, which must correspond to the municipality.

addressRegion.description: Property. NUTS 2 region in which the locality is located.

district.description: Property. Administrative district in which the locality is located.

postalCode.description: Property. Postal code of the address.

streetAddress.description: Property. Street address of the market or fair.

streetNr.description: Property. Street number of the market or fair.

type.description: Property. NGSI entity type. It must be Market.

accessibility.description: Property. Accessibility resources available at the market or fair.

buildingId.description: Property. Unique identifier of the building where the market or fair takes place.

contactPoint.description: Property. Contact details for the market or fair.

capacity.description: Property. Total number of stalls that can be allocated.

dateModified.description: Property. Date and time when the entity was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

dateFinished.description: Property. Date and time when the market or fair finished, in ISO 8601 format.

dateStarted.description: Property. Date and time when the market or fair started, in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: Property. Textual description of the market or fair.

name.description: Property. Name of the market or fair.

managementEntity.description: Property. Identifiers or names of the market owners or management entities.

occupancy.description: Property. Maximum number of people allowed in the space.

openingHours.description: Property. Opening hours in the form DayOfWeek-DayOfWeek HH:MM-HH:MM, with optional additional time periods.

promotingEntity.description: Property. Identifiers or names of the market promoters.

status.description: Property. Current status of the market.

supportingFacilities.description: Property. Identifiers or names of supporting facilities available at the market.
